context_intro: For a computational protein engineering project,
In the context of structure-based drug design,
As part of a therapeutic development pipeline,
For a protein engineering research program,
deliverable_suffix: Please include key design considerations and expected challenges.
Provide guidance on validation approaches and experimental follow-up.
Include relevant computational tools and databases to use.
Describe the key steps and decision points in the workflow.

binder_design.base: {context_intro} {design_verb} a {affinity_descriptor} protein binder targeting {target_name} ({target_class}) expressed by {organism_name}. The binder should achieve {binding_metric}. {output_verb} a {approach_noun} for: (1) initial binder scaffold selection using {computational_tool}, (2) interface design and optimization, (3) specificity profiling. {deliverable_suffix}

variants.nanobody_focused: {context_intro} {design_verb} a {affinity_descriptor} {binder_type} against {target_name} from {organism_name}. Describe the computational {approach_noun} for nanobody library design, docking, and affinity maturation. {deliverable_suffix}
variants.structure_guided: {context_intro} Using available structural data for {target_name} ({uniprot_id}), {design_verb} a {affinity_descriptor} binder using structure-guided design. {output_verb} key interface residues, hotspot prediction strategy, and optimization workflow. {deliverable_suffix}

enzyme_design.base: {context_intro} {design_verb} variants of {target_name} ({target_class}) from {organism_name} with altered substrate specificity or improved catalytic efficiency. {output_verb} a computational {approach_noun} covering: (1) active site scaffold selection, (2) catalytic residue placement using {computational_tool}, (3) substrate binding optimization and variant screening. {deliverable_suffix}

variants.activity_improvement: {context_intro} Improve the catalytic activity of {target_name} ({target_class}) from {organism_name} via directed evolution and rational design. Describe hotspot identification, variant library design, and in silico screening strategies. {deliverable_suffix}

de_novo_protein.base: {context_intro} {design_verb} a de novo protein with {fold_description} fold topology targeting {functional_goal}. {output_verb} a {approach_noun} using hallucination or fragment-based methods with {computational_tool}. Include sequence design, structure validation, and expression considerations. {deliverable_suffix}

variants.functional_scaffold: {context_intro} Create a novel protein scaffold for {functional_goal}. Describe the topology selection, backbone generation, and sequence design pipeline. {deliverable_suffix}

stability_optimization.base: {context_intro} optimize the {stability_metric} of {target_name} ({target_class}) from {organism_name}. {output_verb} a computational {approach_noun} for: (1) stability hotspot identification, (2) point mutation screening using FoldX or Rosetta, (3) combinatorial variant prioritization. {deliverable_suffix}

variants.expression_improvement: {context_intro} improve the expression yield and {stability_metric} of {target_name} from {organism_name}. Describe sequence optimization strategies. {deliverable_suffix}

sequence_design.base: {context_intro} Design protein sequences for a {fold_class} fold scaffold using ProteinMPNN or equivalent inverse folding tools. Target: {target_name} backbone from {organism_name}. {output_verb} the sequence design {approach_noun}, diversity strategy, and filtering criteria. {deliverable_suffix}

variants.conditional_design: {context_intro} Design sequences conditioned on the structure of {target_name} ({uniprot_id}) with {design_constraints}. {deliverable_suffix}

structure_prediction.base: {context_intro} predict the structure of {target_name} ({uniprot_id}) from {organism_name} using {computational_tool}. {output_verb} the prediction {approach_noun}, confidence assessment strategy, multi-state modeling considerations, and validation plan. {deliverable_suffix}

variants.complex_prediction: {context_intro} Model the {target_name}:{binding_partner} complex from {organism_name} using AF-Multimer or equivalent. Describe the modeling strategy and interface analysis. {deliverable_suffix}

bioinformatics_scripting.base: Write a Python script to {task_description} using {tool_ecosystem}. The script should handle {input_description} and produce {output_description}. Include error handling and documentation.

variants.pipeline: Design a bioinformatics pipeline to {task_description}. {output_verb} the workflow, key tools, and data flow. {deliverable_suffix}

protocol_design.base: Describe a {protocol_type} protocol for {target_name} ({target_class}). Include all critical steps, reagents, expected yields, quality control checkpoints, and common troubleshooting issues.

variants.optimization: Outline an optimized {protocol_type} protocol for {target_name} from {organism_name}, focusing on {optimization_goal}. {deliverable_suffix}
